title: NOC 12110 – Court Reporters, Medical Transcriptionists and Related Occupations | GTR Immigration
description: Court Reporters, Medical Transcriptionists, and related specialists play a vital role in the justice system and healthcare delivery across Canada. Classified under NOC 12110, this occupation benefits from steady demand and provides viable immigration pathways toward Permanent Residence (PR) through Canada’s skilled worker programs.

classification.teer: 2 – Occupations usually requiring a college diploma or apprenticeship training of two or more years; or supervisory occupations
classification.minor_group: 1211 – Court reporters, transcriptionists, records management technicians, and statistical officers

duties: Record courtroom proceedings using stenograph machines or stenomasks
Read back evidence on request during hearings
Transcribe court sessions according to legal formats
Transcribe physician dictation and patient reports
Proofread for grammatical and formatting errors
Edit transcripts for missing or incorrect content
employment_requirements: College-level court-reporting programs; CSR certification may be required
Recognized medical transcription programs; CMT certification may be required
Braille specialists usually require training in Unified English Braille (UEB) and related studies
job_outlook: Between 2022 and 2031, Canada is projected to create 10,500 new positions for Court Reporters, Medical Transcriptionists, and related occupations, compared with 10,600 job seekers—making careful province selection and immigration planning especially important for overseas applicants.
additional_information: Professionals in court reporting and medical transcription are employed in courts, hospitals, clinics, and government institutions nationwide.

Continued hiring in legal and healthcare sectorsStable administrative and documentation rolesEligibility for Express Entry and Provincial Nominee Programs (PNPs)Employer-supported immigration optionsAnnual earnings typically ranging from $27,000 to $63,500
